---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it touches a seam (data source, recall, graph, generation),
say which.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Scope

Is this core, or an optional adapter/backend/example domain?
